content: Supabase RLS for anonymous insert: only WITH CHECK applies for INSERT policies (no USING clause needed). Best practice is separate INSERT (anon, restrictive with check) and SELECT (owner-only) policies on analytics-style tables, never a blanket true policy for both. supabase-js .insert().select() requires a matching SELECT policy to read back the row -- a bare .insert() without .select() avoids this trap for roles with no read access.
